_note: Single source of truth for the Past Tense pastel style-lock. The n8n Prepare-Prompt node prepends STYLE_BLOCK_IMAGE to every gpt-image-2 prompt and STYLE_BLOCK_VIDEO to every Veo motion prompt. The Scene Composer writes ONLY the subject + chosen field; it does NOT write the style itself.
STYLE_BLOCK_IMAGE: Flat 2D hand-drawn children's-storybook illustration, simple doodle / educational-cartoon style. Draw with a thin-to-medium, slightly WOBBLY hand-drawn warm-charcoal outline (#211E1A) of even, confident weight, plus light sketchy interior detail lines and only sparse hatching. Use COMPLETELY FLAT color fills in a soft MUTED PASTEL palette — absolutely NO gradients, NO shading, NO highlights, NO cel-shading, NO 3D, NO glossy or metallic effects, NO texture, NO photorealism. Keep it clean, friendly, calm and minimal with generous negative space and one clear subject. Fill the ENTIRE frame edge-to-edge with a single flat pastel background color. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermark, no border or frame.
STYLE_BLOCK_VIDEO: Flat 2D hand-drawn children's-storybook ANIMATION, simple doodle / educational-cartoon style. Everything drawn with thin-to-medium, slightly wobbly warm-charcoal outlines (#211E1A) and COMPLETELY FLAT muted-pastel fills — NO gradients, NO shading, NO highlights, NO 3D, NO realism, NO photographic textures, NO glossy or metallic look. The image stays flat and hand-drawn at ALL times and must never morph into 3D, realistic, or photographic rendering. Motion is smooth, gentle and continuous, calm and minimal. No text, no letters, no captions anywhere.
paletteNote: Backgrounds/fields are CHOSEN from this palette per topic and rotated between scenes; never hard-coded. Red (#DA382F) is semantic-only (danger/emphasis), never a background.

veo.note: MANDATORY: always Veo 3.1 Fast @ 1080p. NEVER Veo 3.1 Lite (veo-3.1-lite-generate-001 is banned, decision 2026-07-03). Prefer image-to-video seeded from a gpt-image-2 frame; make seeds 16:9 to avoid pillarbox.
